  • Field Details

    • wkb25DBit

      static final int wkb25DBit
      Bit mask to indicate that a geometry type is of 2.5D kind.
      Since:
      Java bindings 1.7.0
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • wkb25Bit

      static final int wkb25Bit
      Deprecated.
      This is a typo. Use wkb25DBit instead.
